description: In the aftermath, the team mourns their losses but take comfort in their victory and strengthened bonds. Mack conducts a final sweep and confirms Sibyl is missing, while Deke wonders what's next. Mack decides there's unfinished business and takes Deke along on a personal mission for closure.

transcript.line: I've been over every square inch. Sibyl's nowhere to be found.
Sibyl must have gotten them out somehow.
Okay. So, what happens next? Kick back, relax, and wait for the Zephyr?
